summary: Command Center flow-graph exposes the branch-maintenance flow as `update-branch` (renamed from `merge-main`), including the executor-lane 'Update Branch' label and the CI-watch conflict chain node.

before_after_pairs.label: Flow-type selector: previous name renamed to update-branch
update-branch pipeline with 'Update Branch' executor-lane label and CI-watch chain node

videos.note: Full recipe replay at 2s slow playback: flow-graph selector shows update-branch (no merge-main), executor lane renders the 'Update Branch' label.
